text: Amazon.com, Inc. operates through three primary segments: North America, International, and Amazon Web Services (AWS), engaging in retail sale of consumer products and subscriptions through online and physical stores globally. The company generates revenue from merchandise and content purchased for resale, third-party seller products, electronic devices including Kindle, Fire tablets, Fire TVs, Ring, Blink, eero, and Echo, as well as compute, storage, database, analytics, and machine learning services. Additional revenue streams include fulfillment, advertising, digital content subscriptions, and the Amazon Prime membership program, serving consumers, sellers, developers, enterprises, content creators, and advertisers.
